meaning: n.[常用作定语]生物研究安全性
examples: The printer fits inside a standard laboratory biosafety cabinet, for sterile operation.
The team has noted a need to upgrade biosafety standards in local and national laboratories.
Biohackers could also be brought onto biosafety committees at their local university or medical centre.
If there were, says Ms Smithson, more effort and urgency might go into biosafety and biosecurity.
The country passed strict liability laws in 2009 that negate the need for proof of fault in liability claims involving biosafety.
